2604.18639.title: Easy Samples Are All You Need: Self-Evolving LLMs via Data-Efficient Reinforcement Learning
2604.18639.paper_summary: Previous LLMs-based RL studies typically follow either supervised learning with high annotation costs, or unsupervised paradigms using voting or entropy-based rewards. However, their performance remains far from satisfactory due to the substantial annotation cost and issues such as model collapse or reward hacking. To address these issues, we introduce a new perspective inspired by cognitive learning theory and propose a novel approach called EasyRL. The core of EasyRL is to simulate the human cognitive acquisition curve by integrating reliable knowledge transfer from easy labeled data with a progressive divide-and-conquer strategy that tackles increasingly difficult unlabeled data. Specifically, we initialize a warm-up model using supervised RL with few-shot labeled data. This is followed by a divide-and-conquer pseudo-labeling strategy on difficult unlabeled data, combining consistency-based selection for low-uncertainty cases and reflection-based resolution for medium-uncertainty cases. Finally, difficulty-progressive self-training with iterative pseudo-labeling and RL further strengthens the model's reasoning capability. EasyRL provides a unified self-evolving framework that facilitates data-efficient post-training of LLMs. Experimental results on mathematical and scientific benchmarks demonstrate that EasyRL, using only 10% of easy labeled data, consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines.
2604.18639.paper_summary_zh: 先前基於LLMs的強化學習研究通常遵循高標註成本的監督學習或使用投票或基於熵的獎勵的非監督範式。<lb/>然而，由於龐大的標註成本以及模型崩潰或獎勵駭客等問題，它們的性能仍然遠未令人滿意。<lb/>為了解決這些問題，我們引入了一種受認知學習理論啟發的新視角，並提出了一種名為EasyRL的新方法。<lb/>EasyRL的核心是通過整合來自簡單標註數據的可靠知識轉移，並結合逐步的分而治之策略來模擬人類的認知獲得曲線，該策略專注於處理越來越困難的未標註數據。<lb/>具體而言，我們使用少量標註數據的監督強化學習初始化一個預熱模型。<lb/>接下來，對困難的未標註數據採用分而治之的偽標註策略，結合基於一致性的選擇用於低不確定性的情況，以及基於反思的解決方案用於中等不確定性的情況。<lb/>最後，通過迭代偽標註和強化學習的難度漸進自我訓練進一步增強模型的推理能力。<lb/>EasyRL提供了一個統一的自我演化框架，促進了LLMs的數據高效後訓練。<lb/>在數學和科學基準上的實驗結果顯示，EasyRL僅使用10%的簡單標註數據，始終超越最先進的基準。
2604.18639.author: Zhiyin Yu et.al.
2604.18639.authors: Zhiyin Yu, Bo Zhang, Qibin Hou, Zhonghai Wu, Xiao Luo, Lei Bai
